prompt: A studio 3D render of a small machined apparatus emblem / maker's mark — a precise geometric instrument badge. matte anodized aluminium and bare PCB. monochrome black ink line drawing on warm off-white paper #EDE9E5, a single brick-orange #E05A2B accent only, corner registration crosshairs, datum target triangles, dimension tolerances and an ISO-style title block; no colour anywhere except the one orange accent. A single accent anodised detail.
